titleStmt.title: SII 17.462: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 462. (A.R. No. 431 of 1904.) VĒDĀRAṆYAM, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Vēdāraṇyēśvara temple.

This inscription records the gift of land as tirunāmattukkāṇi to a deity (name lost) whose image was set up by Maḻuvāḷi Śelvan, a mudali in the temple of Tirumaṟaikkāḍuḍaiyār. The sabhā of Kundavai-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Iḍaiyaḷanāḍu of Rājēndra-śōḻavaḷanāḍu made the land free from taxes such as antarāyam, kuḍimai, and nāṭṭu viṉiyōgam.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī rājarājatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 7āvatu rājentiracoḻa vaḷanāṭṭu Iṭaiyaḷa nāṭṭu bahmadeyam śrī kuntavai caruppetimaṅkalattu sapaiyom Uṭaiyār tirumaṟaikkāṭu Uṭaiyār koyilil mutaliyāna maḻuvāḷi celvan Eḻuntaruḷi vitta Uṭaiyār varkku Avvūril tirunāmattukkāṇiyāṉa kuntavai vatikku meṟku vāykkālukku vaṭakku 4kuḻi 2- catirattu � 2 cati rattu � Āka �ghamā ṉāl tarappaṭi maṭakku � kiḻvāyiṉāl
Oṭṭuppaṭi ḷaThis symbol stands for ‘nel’ 10 2 ḷaThis symbol stands for ‘kalam’mum taṇṭat tiruvāymoḻintaruḷi Eṟiṉa nellukku Opātiyum teva tāṉa(ṉ)vopāti Eṟiṉa maṭakkāl nellum Uṭpaṭa Iṉnāyanāṟkku pūcaikku Uṭalāka Iṟai yiliyākak kuṭuttamaiyil In mattil kaḻittu Ūril Oṟṟivaikkak kaṭava tākavum Innilattukkum toṟṟu niṅkal ka ṉaṉ rkku Ivvūril Ūrkkiḻ Iṟaiyiliyāy koṇṭaluṭaiyār ceḻiyakoṉārkku ya ya ṉ Uṭai yār tirumaṟaikkāṭṭu Uṭaiyaārkku tirunāmattukkāṇiyākak kuṭutta caṇṭecuraṉ
koṭṭakam � 4�kkum Antarāyam kuṭimai nāṭṭuviṉiyokam Ūr vivastai Uḷḷiṭṭu varuvaṉavum tavirakkaṭavatākavum Ippaṭi cantirātittavaṟ cellakkaṭavatākak kalveṭṭik kuṭuttom
Digital edition of SII 17.462 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
